category_sources: Official NAIF documentation describes CSPICE as the C implementation of the SPICE Toolkit.
source_facts.description identifies CSPICE as an observation geometry system for robotic space science missions.
display_name_sources: Official NAIF documentation uses the CSPICE name for the C implementation of SPICE.
docs_sources: Official NASA NAIF site hosts CSPICE hypertext documentation and Toolkit overview.
repo_sources: No official source-control project URL was identified; source_facts.source-archive points to the official NAIF distribution archive, but archives are not repositories.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official NAIF documentation describe SPICE/CSPICE as observation geometry tooling for space science missions.
